nasb.text: Also let none of you devise evil in your heart against another, and do not love perjury; for all these are what I hate,’ declares the Lord.”

esv.text: do not devise evil in your hearts against one another, and love no false oath, for all these things I hate, declares the Lord.”

cnv.text: 你們各人不要心裡圖謀惡事，彼此陷害，也不可好起假誓，因為這些都是我所恨惡的。’這是耶和華的宣告。”

ccb.text: 不可设阴谋彼此相害，不可以起假誓为乐，因为这些都是我所憎恶的。这是耶和华说的。’”
